positive: A mesmerizing, stylized celestial botanical arrangement, featuring interwoven bioluminescent nebulae structures intertwined with crystalline jungle flora. The composition must be centrally framed, emphasizing strong, elegant silhouettes of curling vines, starburst flowers, and floating geometric geometric constellations. Use deep indigo, electric turquoise, luminous gold, and cosmic violet for a high-contrast, glowing effect. The style should be a blend of Art Deco precision and modern mystical graphic novel illustration, designed for extreme clarity on apparel. Isolated on a gradient void background, clean edges, perfect symmetry.
